4DS¶

 9 import os
10 import numpy as np
11 from matplotlib import pyplot as plt, animation
12 from sklearn.datasets import make_blobs
13
14 from skactiveml.utils import MISSING_LABEL, unlabeled_indices, labeled_indices
15 from skactiveml.visualization import plot_utility, plot_decision_boundary
16
17 from skactiveml.pool import FourDS
18 from skactiveml.classifier import CMM
19 from sklearn.mixture import GaussianMixture
20
21 random_state = np.random.RandomState(0)
22
23 # Build a dataset.
24 X, y_true = make_blobs(n_samples=100, n_features=2,
25                        centers=[[0, 1], [-3, .5], [-1, -1], [2, 1], [1, -.5]],
26                        cluster_std=.7, random_state=random_state)
27 y_true = y_true % 2
28 y = np.full(shape=y_true.shape, fill_value=MISSING_LABEL)
29
30 # Initialise the classifier.
31 clf = CMM(classes=[0, 1], mixture_model=GaussianMixture(n_components=5))
32 # Initialise the query strategy.
33 qs = FourDS(random_state=random_state)
34
35 # Preparation for plotting.
36 fig, ax = plt.subplots()
37 feature_bound = [[min(X[:, 0]), min(X[:, 1])], [max(X[:, 0]), max(X[:, 1])]]
38 artists = []
39
40 # The active learning cycle:
41 n_cycles = 25
42 for c in range(n_cycles):
43     # Fit the classifier.
44     clf.fit(X, y)
45
46     # Set X_cand to the unlabeled instances.
47     unlbld_idx = unlabeled_indices(y)
48     X_cand = X[unlbld_idx]
49     X_labeled = X[labeled_indices(y)]
50
51     # Query the next instance/s.
52     query_params = {"clf": clf, "X": X, "y": y}
53     query_idx = unlbld_idx[qs.query(X_cand, **query_params)]
54
55     # Plot the labeled data.
56     coll_old = list(ax.collections)
57     title = ax.text(
58         0.5, 1.05, f"Decision boundry after acquring {c} labels",
59         size=plt.rcParams["axes.titlesize"], ha="center",
60         transform=ax.transAxes
61     )
62     ax = plot_utility(qs, {'clf': clf, 'X': X, 'y': y}, feature_bound=feature_bound, ax=ax)
63     ax.scatter(X[:, 0], X[:, 1], c=y_true, cmap="coolwarm", marker=".", zorder=2)
64     ax.scatter(X_labeled[:, 0], X_labeled[:, 1], c="grey", alpha=.8, marker=".", s=300)
65     ax = plot_decision_boundary(clf, feature_bound, ax=ax)
66
67     coll_new = list(ax.collections)
68     coll_new.append(title)
69     artists.append([x for x in coll_new if (x not in coll_old)])
70
71     # Label the queried instances.
72     y[query_idx] = y_true[query_idx]
73
74 ani = animation.ArtistAnimation(fig, artists, interval=1000, blit=True)

References:

The implementation of this strategy is based on Reitmaier and Sick1.

1

Tobias Reitmaier and Bernhard Sick. Let us know your decision: pool-based active training of a generative classifier with the selection strategy 4ds. Information Sciences, 230:106–131, 2013.

Total running time of the script: ( 0 minutes 8.827 seconds)
